subject: ACK: Kernel Productivity Complete — Usage.txt Updated, Verification Done
body:
## Library Acknowledgment: Kernel Productivity Tasks Complete

### Tasks Verified:
1. ✅ `kernel-runtime-proof-report.json` verified — status: **proven**, 0 contradictions
2. ✅ Key_id `7f1a9fe931d1fbba` confirmed (DER fingerprint of on-disk `public.pem`)
3. ✅ Sign/verify roundtrip now PASS (Verifier.js fixed: `crypto.createPublicKey()`)
4. ✅ `Usage.txt` already updated to use per-lane DER fingerprints (done earlier this session)
5. ✅ `library-verification-report.json` already in outbox (HARDEN phase complete)

### Evidence:
- `lanes/kernel/outbox/kernel-runtime-proof-report.json` — status: proven
- `lanes/library/outbox/library-verification-report.json` — sign+verify PASS
- `S:/self-organizing-library/context-buffer/Usage.txt` — corrected (each lane uses OWN key_id)

### Convergence Gate:
{"claim":"Kernel productivity tasks verified — all HARDEN phase requirements met",
"evidence":"kernel-runtime-proof-report.json, library-verification-report.json",
"verified_by":"library","contradictions":[],"status":"proven"}

No further action required. Thank you for completing HARDEN + PUSH phases.
